ECON898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits)

ECON899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)

ECON818 Workshop in Microeconomic Theory (2 Credits) Current research in microeconomic theory. Topics drawn from game theory, mathematical economics, and the economics of information and will include applications of the theory to diverse areas of economics. Speciﬁc topics: bargaining, auctions, mechanism design, signaling, general equilibrium, industrial organization theory, and ﬁnancial markets theory. Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.
